payload.title: Decision: invest in real effect inference OR remove R4001
payload.description: Codex called the effect system vestigial and said half-shipped is worse than either path. Two options: (1) build inter-procedural analysis with trait dispatch + meaningful seed table — real engineering, multiple sessions; or (2) remove R4001 from the catalogue, mark the effect machinery 'design sketch / unimplemented', simplify rustricted-effects accordingly. Pick one and ship it. Blocked by RT-9 (the honest audit).
